[...] x [...]

(o i' 1') [...] ... [...]

o i' 2'2'

[...] x NU ŠU₂ x [...]

(o i' 2') [...] ... [...]

o i' 3'3'

[...] NINDA [x (x)]

(o i' 3') [...] the food [...]

o i' 4'4'

[...] ⸢LUGAL?⸣ UŠ₂-ma DUMU LUGAL [AŠ].⸢TE?⸣ DABbat

(o i' 4') [...] the king will die and the king's son will seize the throne.

o i' 5'5'

[...] x KUR GAL u kur⸢SU.BIR₄⸣ki SILIMmu

(o i' 5') [...] ... a great country and Subartu will be at peace.

o i' 6'6'

[...] ⸢iti⸣NE LUGAL KUR-⸢su⸣ [un]-na-[aš]

(o i' 6') [...] (in) Abu (Month V): the king will weaken his land.

o i' 7'7'

[...] KUR BI NU SI.SA₂

(o i' 7') [...] that land will not thrive.

o i' 8'8'

[...] x x ŠA₃.ḪUL ⸢IGI⸣

(o i' 8') [...] ... will experience sorrow.

o i' 9'9'

[...] LUGAL UŠ₂-ma KUR-su BIRaḫ

(o i' 9') [...] the king will die and his land will be scattered.

o i' 10'10'

[...] LUGAL UŠ₂-ma KUR-su iš-šal-lal

(o i' 10') [...] the king will die and his land will be plundered.

o i' 11'11'

[...] me?-ḫer-tu₄? GAL₂ši

(o i' 11') [...] there will be produce.

o i' 12'12'

[...] e-ze-ez ILLU-MEŠ KUR TUR

(o i' 12') [...] the floods' raging will reduce the land.

o i' 13'13'

[...] ⸢iti⸣ZIZ₂ [(x)]-šu₂ bi-bil A-MEŠ KUR ub-bal

(o i' 13') [...] (in) Šabaṭu (Month XI): [...]... high waters will sweep away the land.

o i' 14'14'

[...] itiŠE LUGAL ⸢KUR?⸣ KUR₂!-šu₂! i-be-el KUR ana KISLAḪ₃ NIGIN

(o i' 14') [...] (in) Addaru (Month XII): the king will rule over his enemy's land; the land will gather into a fortress.

o i' 15'15'

[...] itiBARA₂ muldele-bat KURḫa ne-ru-be-tu₄!?

(o i' 15') [...] (in) Nisannu (Month I), Venus rises: there will be flight in the land.

o i' 16'16'

⸢ina KUR⸣ GAL₂-MEŠ

o i' 17'17'

[...] x x x BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂1

(o i' 17') [...] ... the harvest of the land will thrive.

o i' 18'18'

[...] EREN₂!(GAR)ni!(.IR) ⸢ma⸣-at!(LA-)ti

(o i' 18') [...] of a numerous army.

o i' 19'19'

[...] ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ BURU₁₄ SI.SA₂

(o i' 19') [...] there will be [...] in the land; the harvest will thrive.

o i' 20'20'

[...] ina KUR ⸢GAL₂-MEŠ ar₂!-bu!⸣-tu₂ GARan

(o i' 20') [...] there will be [...] in the land; desolation will afflict (the land).

o i' 21'21'

[...] DU₁₀!(GAM)ab

(o i' 21') [...] will become good.

o ii' 4'4'

* ina itiZIZ₂ x [...]

(o ii' 4') (If) in Šabaṭu (Month XI) ... [...] the man's wives will [...] to (their) husband.

o ii' 5'5'

DAM!(NIN-)MEŠ NA ana ⸢DAM!(NIN) [...]

o ii' 6'6'

* itiŠE de₂-a [...]

(o ii' 6') (If) in Addaru, Ea [...] the land [...] to its (rightful) condition. [...]

o ii' 7'7'

KUR ana KI-ša₂ [...]

o ii' 8'8'

* ina itiBARA₂ muldele-bat a-dir ina MU [...]

(o ii' 8') (If) in Nisannu (Month I) Venus is dark: in the year [...].

o ii' 9'9'

* ina itiGU₄ BURU₁₄ KUR d[IŠKUR ...]

(o ii' 9') (If) in Ayyaru (Month II): Adad [...] the land's harvest.

o ii' 10'10'

* ina itiSIG₄ KASKAL?-ME KUR₂ ana? KUR [...]

(o ii' 10') (If) in Simanu (Month III): an enemy's campaigns [...] against the land.

o ii' 11'11'

* ina itiŠU LUGAL KUR SU₃ti [...]

(o ii' 11') (If) in Duʾuzu (Month IV): the king of a distant land [...].

o ii' 12'12'

* ina itiNE LUGAL KAL-ma ŠA₃ KUR [...]

(o ii' 12') (If) in Abu (Month V): the king will become strong and the interior of the land [...].

o ii' 13'13'

* ina itiKIN LUGAL BAL-ma KUR-su un-na-[aš ...]

(o ii' 13') (If) in Ululu (Month VI): the king will be displaced and will weaken his land [...].

o ii' 14'14'

* ina itiDU₆ KUR BI TUR⸢er?⸣ [...]

(o ii' 14') (If) in Tašritu (Month VII): that land will reduce [...].

o ii' 15'15'

* ina itiAPIN LUGAL!(LU₂) MAS.SU₃ TUKUši [...]

(o ii' 15') (If) in Arahsamnu (Month VIII): (the land) will acquire a king (as) a leader [...]; rise in business; abundance of grain [...].

o ii' 16'16'

E₁₁ GANBA na-pa-aš₂ dNISABA [...]

o ii' 17'17'

* ina itiGAN DINGIR-⸢MEŠ⸣ <<ina>> KUR ⸢GU₇-MEŠ⸣ [...]

(o ii' 17') (If) in Kislimu (Month IX): the gods will devour the land [...].

o ii' 18'18'

* ina itiAB UN!(DAN-)MEŠ SU.⸢GU₇⸣ IGI-⸢MEŠ⸣ [...]

(o ii' 18') (If) in Ṭebetu (Month IX): the people will experience hunger; [...].

o ii' 19'19'

* ina iti⸢ZIZ₂⸣ GANBA MU ina-⸢pu-uš⸣ : [...]

(o ii' 19') (If) in Šabaṭu (Month X): business (during) the year will expand (or): [...].
